text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I shall adjust my plans and use this time
to rest.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Where am I? Last I recall, I was sleeping in the
infirmary...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Flash, shouldn't we go to the gym soon?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, for class? What time is it?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Wha... This classroom has no clock!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Could it be that clocks—no, that the very concept
of time doesn't exist?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This cannot be... How can I possibly survive in
such a world?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Wait... If there are no clocks, then I can simply
become a clock myself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, the sun still exists, so if I act as a
sundial and read the numbers out loud...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I can create the concept of time!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh... what a relief. It was merely a dream...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Still, it seems I can function surprisingly well
without clocks... Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her nice dream, Eishin Flash is back to
her usual self.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Flash, class is about to start.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's "about" to start? When is that, exactly? The
time... You must tell me the time!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh, it was just an Albtraum... And what a terrible nightmare it was... I feel as though I didn't get a moment's rest... Sigh...
